rows.description: NB. Masons (3.18.8¼) was money received from goods seiz'd &c. by ye College May 1742. rem. still due to ye Coll:
rows.notes: Used gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms this descriptive line has no direct column amounts; the large monetary value (£284 6s 9¾d) belongs to the subsequent total line. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned this total to this descriptive line. Description wording also slightly improved based on gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Note that the Masons sum was money received from goods seized by the college in May 1742; remainder still due to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note that the Masons sum was money received from goods seized by the college in May 1742, amounting to £3 18s 8¼d.
